[Date]

Dr. Samuel Tan  
123 Innovation Avenue  
Singapore 567890

Dear Dr. Tan,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Research Scientist at Quantum Dynamics Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 202345678A). Your role will commence on 1st December 2023, and your annual salary will be SGD 120,000, payable in equal monthly installments.

You will be reporting directly to Ms. Clara Lim, Head of Research. Your primary responsibilities will encompass leading various research initiatives and ensuring alignment with project plans. Please note that the project status reports are to be submitted on a quarterly basis.

Your employee number will be linked with your NRIC, accessible at https://quantumdynamics.sg/employee/S2345678B. For any queries, feel free to contact us at +65 6123 4567 or hr@quantumdynamics.sg.

Kindly sign and return a copy of this letter to confirm your acceptance of this offer.

Yours sincerely,

Mr. Alan Lee  
Director of Human Resources  
Quantum Dynamics Pte. Ltd.  
Phone: +65 6543 2109  
Email: alan.lee@quantumdynamics.sg

[End of Document]
